Home Project Status

Project Status

track your project

Check Your Order Status

Enter your email address or project number to see the current status of your locker room project.

Your Project Journey

Every PlayerStall project moves through these stages. Your contact keeps you informed at every step.

1

Consultation

We discuss your needs and vision

2

Design & Quote

Custom layout and itemized pricing

3

Approval

Revisions until you're satisfied, then deposit

4

Production

Built at our facility (2 to 12 weeks)

5

Shipping

Carefully packed and shipped to you

6

Installation

Setup with our guide and phone support

Need a Direct Update?

Your contact person is always available for updates, changes, or questions. You can also reach our main team anytime.

Phone 1 888 584 1444
Email sales@playerstall.com
Hours Mon to Fri 9am to 5pm, Sat 10am to 2pm

See the full process from start to finish

Prepare your space and install your lockers

Warranty & Care

5 year warranty details and maintenance tips

PlayerStall

Custom wood locker rooms for collegiate and professional programs. Priced right. Built to last. 30+ years of craftsmanship.
